proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { lib(nat.division).nat_div(x0, x1) * x1 + lib(nat.nat_base).nat_mod(x0, x1) = x0 }(n, p)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { exists(k0: Nat) { x0 + k0 = x1 } = x0 <= x1 }(lib(nat.division).nat_div(n, p) * p, n)
not exists(k0: Nat) { lib(nat.division).nat_div(n, p) * p + k0 = n }
function(x0: Nat) { lib(nat.division).nat_div(n, p) * p + x0 != n }(lib(nat.nat_base).nat_mod(n, p))
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { not x0 <= x1 or x0 * x2 <= x1 * x2 }(n, lib(nat.division).nat_div(n, p), p)
function(x0: Nat) { exists(k0: Nat) { k0.suc = x0 } or Nat.zero = x0 }(fuel)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { Nat.zero != x0 or 0 = digit_sum_fuel(x1, x2, x0) }(fuel, p, 0)
let w0: Nat satisfy { w0.suc = fuel }

function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat, x3: Nat) { x0.suc != x1 or (if x2 = 0 { 0 } else { lib(nat.nat_base).nat_mod(x2, x3) + digit_sum_fuel(x3, lib(nat.division).nat_div(x2, x3), x0) }) = digit_sum_fuel(x3, x2, x1) }(w0, fuel, 0, p)

function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat, x3: Nat) { x0.suc != x1 or (if x2 = 0 { 0 } else { lib(nat.nat_base).nat_mod(x2, x3) + digit_sum_fuel(x3, lib(nat.division).nat_div(x2, x3), x0) }) = digit_sum_fuel(x3, x2, x1) }(k, k.suc, n, p)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { digit_sum(x0, x1) = digit_sum_fuel(x0, x1, x1) }(p, 0)
